chin_hakha.for_pm_times_after_noon_subtract_12_fr: Chunhlai hnu PM caan hna caah, suimilh chungin 12 hrenh.
chin_hakha.for_am_times_the_hour_stays_the_same: AM caan hna caah, suimilh cu cuticun a um.
chin_hakha.move_one_representation_and_watch_anal: Representation pakhat thlen law analog, 12-hour, le 24-hour caan zeitindah aa pehtlai ti hmuh.
chin_hakha.break_an_interval_into_friendly_jumps_: Interval kha suimilh dihmi tiang jumps a fawi mi ah ṭhen law jumps kha i pumh.
chin_hakha.the_interval_is_zero_so_start_and_end_: Interval cu zero a si, cucaah thawknak le dongnak cu aa lo.
chin_hakha.use_12_hour_form_with_am_or_pm: AM asiloah PM he 12-hour form hmang.
chin_hakha.enter_a_time_such_as_13_25_or_1_25_pm: Caan rak khaṭṭh, 13:25 asiloah 1:25 PM bantuk.
chin_hakha.enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_1_: Minute asiloah duration rak khaṭṭh, suimilh 1 min 15 bantuk.
chin_hakha.not_yet_draw_jumps_between_the_two_tim: A si rih lo. Caan pahnih karlak ah jumps hlik law ṭhan hmuh.
chin_hakha.compare_event_lengths_free_time_gaps_a: Events saumi, free-time gaps, le plan pumpi lennak i khaikhan.
chin_hakha.mark_both_times_on_a_number_line_jump_: Caan pahnih kha number line ah tial. Suimilh dihmi a fawi mi tiang cawn, suimilh dihmi hna telh, cun min a hnumi hna in dih.
chin_hakha.enter_a_time_such_as_18_40_or_6_40_pm: Caan rak khaṭṭh, 18:40 asiloah 6:40 PM bantuk.
chin_hakha.enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_2_: Minute asiloah duration rak khaṭṭh, suimilh 2 min 15 bantuk.
chin_hakha.not_yet_use_a_clock_timeline_or_minute: A si rih lo. Suimilh, timeline, asiloah zanlei hnu minute hmang.
chin_hakha.moving_to_another_missed_challenge: A palhmi challenge dang ah a kal.
chin_hakha.retry_set_complete_returning_to_all_ch: Retry set a dih. Challenges vialte ah a kir.
chin_hakha.a_stable_deterministic_practice_set_wi: Practice set a ngutmi le a hmaanmi, difficulty bands le palhmi ṭhan tuah awk queue a ngeimi.
chin_hakha.durations_may_be_entered_in_total_minu: Durations cu min a dihlak ah asiloah suimilh le min ah rak khaṭṭh khawh a si.
chin_hakha.draw_jumps_to_a_friendly_hour: Suimilh dihmi a fawi mi tiang jumps hlik.
chin_hakha.convert_each_time_to_minutes_after_mid: Caan pakhat cio kha zanlei hnu minute ah lengh.
chin_hakha.for_a_missing_start_count_backward_fro: Thawknak a um lomi caah, dongnak in hnulei ah rel.
chin_hakha.crossing_midnight_begins_a_new_24_hour: Zanlei raan nih 24-hour cycle thar a thawk.
chin_hakha.see_time_count_time_plan_time_and_expl: Caan hmuh, caan rel, caan tuah timh, na strategy chim.
chin_hakha.time_and_schedule_lab_sections: Time and Schedule Lab ṭhennak hna
chin_hakha.a_clock_time_and_an_amount_of_time_are: Suimilh caan le caan zaat cu quantities aa dangmi an si. Units kha durations he ttial.
chin_hakha.no_timer_pressure_keyboard_friendly_te: Timer pressure a um lo · keyboard friendly · text alternatives a ngei
